entries.title: Sermon 16 on the NT
entries.excerpt: [LXVI. Ben.] On the words of the Gospel, Matthew 11:2 , Now when John heard in the prison the works of the Christ, he sent by his disciples, and said to him, are you He that comes, or look we for another? etc. The lesson of the Holy Gospel has set before us a question touching John the Baptist. May the Lord assist me to resolve it to you, as He has resolved it to us. John was commended, as you have heard, by the testimony of Christ, and in such terms commended, as that there had not risen a greater among those who were born of women. But a greater than he had been born of a Virgin. How much…
